# Brand assets

Versioned brand assets live in `src/public/brand/` and are generated by:

```powershell
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/assets/generate-brand-assets.ps1
```

## Generated files

| File | Current use |
| --- | --- |
| `onlygantt-logo.svg` | Scalable logo asset for UI and documentation use. |
| `onlygantt.ico` | Windows icon used by the MSI uninstall/program entry through WiX `ARPPRODUCTICON`. |
| `icon-16.png`, `icon-24.png`, `icon-32.png`, `icon-48.png`, `icon-256.png` | Raster icon source set used to build `onlygantt.ico`. |
| `social-og-1200x630.png` | Open Graph/link preview asset. |
| `social-x-large-1200x600.png` | 2:1 social preview asset. |
| `social-linkedin-1200x627.png` | LinkedIn-style link preview asset. |
| `post-square-1080x1080.png` | Square social post asset. |
| `post-portrait-1080x1350.png` | Portrait social post asset. |
| `setup-banner-493x58.png` | Generated WiX-style bitmap asset; not currently wired into the MSI UI. |
| `setup-dialog-493x312.png` | Generated WiX-style bitmap asset; not currently wired into the MSI UI. |

The current MSI does not create desktop or Start Menu shortcuts.

## Dimensions

The Windows icon source set contains 16, 24, 32, 48 and 256 px images. Social image dimensions are encoded in the generated file names.
